inline_comments.message: Not sure where its failing down, but when I expand the value field for an input that is defined in the VFC with a default value, I am not seeing the default value in the interface operation inputs value field

the problem was in the input list value initialization: InputListComponent.initValue method (catalog-ui/src/app/ng2/pages/composition/interface-operatons/operation-creator/input-list/input-list.component.ts).
It was ignoring the default value; it was just reading the value, otherwise setting a default empty value based on the type. Now I changed to consider the default value in case there is no value present.
